hardBlocks: CONTRADICTED [platform]: article says Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone streams on Netflix — TMDB/JustWatch shows Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone streams on HBO Max, Peacock Premium, Peacock Premium Plus, NOT Netflix. State only HBO Max, Peacock Premium, Peacock Premium Plus.

CONTRADICTED [platform]: article says Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone streams on Disney+ — TMDB/JustWatch shows Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone streams on HBO Max, Peacock Premium, Peacock Premium Plus, NOT Disney+. State only HBO Max, Peacock Premium, Peacock Premium Plus.
